description_long: This object is an abstract, highly stylized representation of a pedestrian adult, featuring elongated, angular limbs and a sharply faceted body structure. The form is composed of intersecting planes and spikes, with a dominant blue and brown coloration and a small, textured black mass at one extremity, possibly representing hair or a head. The body is stretched and contorted, lacking realistic anatomical proportions, and the limbs are exaggeratedly thin and extended. The surfaces are smooth and hard, with a semi-glossy finish that reflects light in certain areas. There are no discernible facial features, clothing details, or accessories, and the overall appearance is more sculptural than lifelike. The object appears hollow or partially solid, with large open spaces between the structural elements.
description: An abstract, angular sculpture of a pedestrian adult with elongated limbs and intersecting blue and brown planes, featuring a small textured black mass at one end. The form is highly stylized, smooth, and semi-glossy, lacking realistic anatomical detail.
description_view_0: From this view, the elongated limbs and intersecting planes are prominent, with the small black mass visible at the tip of one extremity.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the wide, flat blue plane and the sharp, angular brown extensions, with less visibility of the black mass.
description_view_2: The view highlights the verticality of the structure, showing the blue plane rising upward and the brown elements jutting out, with the black mass at the lower left.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the long, tapering blue extension and the underside of the brown planes, with the black mass partially visible at the edge.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract sculptural form with no discernible clothing
